# Regex fixtures for skill: agent-team-review
# Format: one directive per non-empty, non-comment line.
#   MATCH: <prompt>     — regex from config/default-triggers.json for this skill must match
#   NO_MATCH: <prompt>  — regex must NOT match
# Tested deterministically by tests/test-regex-fixtures.sh (zero LLM cost).
# NO_MATCH lines pin the same word boundaries as requesting-code-review:
# embedded review (pREVIEW) and embedded pr (imPRove, sPRint) must not fire.

MATCH: team review before merge
MATCH: run a multi agent review of this change
MATCH: thorough review of the hook changes
MATCH: comprehensive review of the migration
MATCH: review the changes with specialist agents

NO_MATCH: preview my changes
NO_MATCH: improve the sprint process
